_comment: Authored by Claude. News daemon polls these queries every cadence. Emits news_flash events ONLY when a headline contains ≥1 required keyword AND the URL hasn't been seen before AND the query's cooldown has elapsed. Claude updates this as thesis shifts.

queries.query: Iran US ceasefire deal Islamabad talks
queries.note: TUNED 2026-04-22 11:38 UTC — fixed-deadline binary REMOVED (4-source verification of Trump indefinite extension: Reuters/NYT/Detroit News/AJ). Dropped 'expire'/'expiry' (deadline p | 2026-04-22 23:55 UTC TUNE: DROPPED "announce"+"Islamabad" (caught Apr 12 WaPo Islamabad-talks-collapse republish via announce+Islamabad match). ADDED "walks out","Iran walkout","Vance trip" phrases. Keyword set now escalation-specific.

RE-TUNED 2026-04-22T23:21:42Z — prior 30min cooldown + broad attack kw let Apr 18 Express Tribune India-summons-Iran-envoy archive fire this tick (5-day-old Touska-aftermath republish, not fresh kinetic rung). Added match_keywords=[2026,April,Apr 22,Apr 23] date filter (fed_fomc/boj/opec pattern). Cooldown 30→60min. Keeps kw list same — date filter forces current-cycle content.

queries.query: US Iran naval Hormuz blockade retaliation
queries.note: RE-TUNED 2026-04-22 18:55 UTC — prior 'retaliation'/'retaliate'/'struck'/'escalation'/'mine' flooded 12 stale archive articles this tick: 10 Apr 13-14 original blockade-announcement (Algemeiner/Fox/Globe & Mail/MSN/etc.) + 1 Apr 16 CNBC 'fourth day' + 1 Apr 19 Il Sole Touska republish. Those keywords match 9-day-old routine coverage of baseline state. REMOVED broad keywords; kept only action-verbs describing NEW escalation rungs (missile launched, casualties, sunk, ablaze) + forward diplomatic names (Vance/Witkoff/Kushner/Islamabad) + de-escalation-trigger phrases (Hormuz reopen, blockade lifted, new talks, walkout). Cooldown 60→120min. If this still floods: add date-filter logic to daemon.

RE-TUNED 2026-04-22T22:18:17Z — prior broad keywords ['increase','announce','hike','meeting'] matched 4 stale archives this tick (Aug 2025 NYT, Sep 2025 NYT, Mar 2026 Reuters x2). Narrowed to action-verbs + forward-looking supply-shock triggers tied to current Hormuz situation. Added match_keywords=['2026','April','May 2026','June 2026'] date filter (fed_fomc/boj pattern). Cooldown 60→120min.

queries.query: Bank of Japan yen intervention MoF Katayama
queries.note: RE-TUNED 2026-04-22T22:01:27Z — prior 120min cooldown still let Jan 21 2026 Business Times 'Japanese bonds may rebound after Katayama calls for market calm' archive fire (stale market-calm commentary, not fresh action). Added match_keywords=['2026','April','Apr 27','Apr 28','policy meeting'] to enforce current-cycle content. Cooldown 120→180min. Same fed_fomc-style date-filter pattern. Re-evaluate after BoJ Apr 27-28.

TUNED 2026-04-22T21:27:27Z — added match_keywords=['2026'] to block Oct 2025 Powell archive republish (stale '2025' article fired this tick despite prior narrowing of query text). Strict 2026 filter will force current-FOMC-era matches only. Re-evaluate after Apr 28-29 meeting passes.

RE-TUNED 2026-04-21 07:38 UTC — prior keywords 'hike'/'shock'/'hawkish'/'dovish' still matched 10 stale archive articles (pub Dec 2025 — Mar 2026) this tick. Further narrowed to action/person specific. Market pricing May hike to 4.35%. Risk-off may force RBA to pause — AUD bid thesis broken under blockade.

RE-TUNED 2026-04-22T20:08:03Z — prior keywords 'deal'/'agreement'/'announcement' flooded 8 stale archive articles this tick (7 Jan-Feb 2026 on India-US tariff reset history + 1 Apr 21 BLiTZ Pakistan-framed). Narrowed to specific fresh-action verbs (signed, lowered, raised, reset, executive order, Modi). Cooldown 60→240min (secondary priority — FII flow concern doesn't directly move 9 FX pairs I trade).
